/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/wechat_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/Sources/Login.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/Sources/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/Sources/RegisterDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/Sources/Global.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/Sources/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/Sources/HttpMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/wechat_autogen/SJ56Y4VZUD/qrc_res.cpp.o -o /home/eai/demo/weChat/client/build/bin/wechat  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Sql.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
